_comment: Working example: the homelab k3s cluster this plugin was built and battle-tested against. 'The Citadel' is an AI command center on a single-node ARM Grace+Blackwell box running ~16 namespaces.
cluster_context: Single-node k3s 1.34 on ARM Grace+Blackwell. Network: Tailscale (mgmt plane, TCP protocols) + Traefik (data plane, HTTP/S) + Authelia 2FA. Secrets: SealedSecrets controller in kube-system; etcd AES-CBC encryption. Storage: local-path provisioner, no CSI. Backups: host-level CronJob system writing to Cloudflare R2 (only paid resource; cost target < $1/mo).
